description: Kindora is a grant discovery and fundraising intelligence platform for nonprofits and consultants. It provides foundation, grant-program, and IRS 990 data, plus paid AI-assisted research and pipeline features for Kindora customers.
summary: Kindora exposes two MCP surfaces: a public no-auth streamable HTTP MCP server and a Pro streamable HTTP MCP endpoint authenticated by either a Kindora-issued bearer service key or an unpublished OAuth connector flow; no public REST/GraphQL API or CLI was found on kindora.co.
